title: WorkDoc Table Sorting
excerpt: I am surprised that there doesn’t appear to be any way to sort a board table that is on a WorkDoc. Here is the scenario - we are using WorkDocs for our meeting agendas within our firm. We have multiple boards and widgets…

posts.author: MichWing (Michelle Winger)
posts.cookedHtml: I am surprised that there doesn’t appear to be any way to sort a board table that is on a WorkDoc. Here is the scenario - we are using WorkDocs for our meeting agendas within our firm. We have multiple boards and widgets providing the info we need. We have one board connected that is specifically for action items relating to what we discussed in the agenda. I would like to be able to sort the board by the priority column so that our agenda will show the highest priority topics at the top. You cannot save a sort view for a board that is being viewed on a workdoc so even if I go directly to the board and save the sort for the board itself, the sorting does not show on the WorkDoc.

posts.author: Stetzinger (Andy Stetzinger)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping this. I do a monthly presentation and embed a board into a workdoc. Really needs the ability to sort
